en: Remember our last concert? The crowd were singing our songs back to us.
ko: 지난 콘서트 기억나? 관중들이 우리의 노래를 함께 불렀어.

en: I mean, it was deafening, but it was wonderful.
They're becoming a part of our show.
ko: 그들이 우리의 공연의 일부가 되고 있어.

en: I want to encourage that, so I've got an idea to involve them a little bit more.
ko: 그걸 더 장려하고 싶어서, 그들을 조금 더 참여시키는 아이디어가 있어.

en: Let's start with this.
Stamp to this beat.
Genius.
Thank you, John.
Come on.
Good.
Now, I want you to clap on the third beat.
ko: 이제 세 번째 비트에 맞춰 박수를 쳐봐.

en: Don't speed up.
Rog, keep that time.
No, printer.
It's unusual to see you without your clone.
ko: 너의 복제인 없이 너를 보는 건 드문 일이야.

en: It's unusual seeing you be so bitchy.
Ah, you kept the time, Rog. Good.
ko: 아, 시간을 잘 맞췄네, 록. 잘했어.

en: What's going on?
You'd know if you were on time.
I'm a performer, darling, not a Swiss train conductor.
ko: 나는 공연자야, 자기야, 스위스 기차 운전사가 아니야.
